refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide analysis of the worksite terrain.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR includes multiple obligations: analyzing terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation. To be atomic and solution-neutral, these should be separated into distinct FRs. This refined FR focuses solely on terrain analysis, which is a fundamental aspect of worksite area analysis without implying any implementation or combining multiple functions.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify that the system can generate and present accurate terrain data of the worksite independently from other features such as obstacles or work-zone representation.
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall provide analysis of the worksite obstacles.
The NGHE solution shall provide representation of the work-zone within the worksite.

candidate_dps: Generate a digital terrain model representing key site features
Extract and classify terrain features relevant to safety and operations
Create a geospatial map integrating terrain data with safety and operational policies
Provide an interface to update and validate terrain data continuously
selected_dp.selected_dp: Generate a digital terrain model representing key site features

potential_sources: Integration of terrain data with safety and operational policies may introduce coupling if not modularized
coupling_check.notes: Selecting a DP focused on generating a digital terrain model keeps the solution modular and allows separate DPs or IMs to handle policy integration and updates, supporting independence.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate raw terrain data for modeling
Risk that terrain model may not capture all features required by safety and operational policies
Assumes that downstream planning/execution functions can consume the generated model format
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider decomposing the DP further to separate terrain data generation from policy integration to enhance modularity and reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The NGHE Solution module encompasses data processing and environmental modeling functions, including generation of digital terrain models from sensor data.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data and site information necessary for terrain modeling.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands to initiate terrain model generation.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Sends generated digital terrain models and related data to other system components or operators.

module_containment_scores.notes: Highly cohesive as terrain modeling is a core data processing function; minimal diffusion as data inputs and outputs are well encapsulated.
Vehicle primarily handles mobility and control; terrain modeling would require extensive data sharing and cause high diffusion.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control and monitoring; including terrain modeling would diffuse responsibilities and increase coupling.
Safety Services are focused on alerts and safety monitoring; terrain modeling is outside its scope and would cause high diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary for containing the digital terrain model generation DP because it specializes in environmental data processing and modeling, ensuring high cohesion and low diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data input which may affect model accuracy.
Integration with other modules requires well-defined interfaces to avoid data bottlenecks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP 'Generate a digital terrain model representing key site features' directly satisfies the FR 'The NGHE solution shall provide analysis of the worksite terrain' by producing a digital representation of the terrain, which is the core analytical output required.

diffusion_risks: Potential dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data input which may affect model accuracy.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The DP is well contained within the NGHE Solution module, which specializes in environmental data processing and modeling. The module shows high cohesion (containment score 9) and minimal diffusion (diffusion score 1), indicating a strong architectural packaging with well-defined interfaces for input (Telemetry, Tasking) and output (Network Link).

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through the availability of the generated worksite model/map to planning and execution functions, as per acceptance criteria. The interfaces support data flow necessary for verification.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The ownership candidate 'NGHE Solution' is clearly defined and appropriate for implementing the FR, with minimal overlap or diffusion into other modules.

recommended_revisions: Monitor and mitigate risks related to telemetry data quality and timeliness to ensure model accuracy.
Ensure interfaces between NGHE Solution and other modules are robust and well-defined to prevent data bottlenecks and maintain low diffusion.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed with strong containment, clear ownership, and feasible verification. The DP fully satisfies the FR, and the IM is well defined with minimal diffusion and high cohesion. Although there are some risks related to telemetry data quality and timeliness, these are manageable and do not warrant further decomposition at this stage. Given the high safety criticality, monitoring and mitigation plans are recommended rather than additional sub-FR derivation.

revise.why: To monitor and mitigate risks related to telemetry data quality and timeliness, and to ensure robust interfaces to prevent data bottlenecks and maintain low diffusion.

assumptions: Telemetry data input quality and timeliness can be effectively monitored and controlled.
The NGHE Solution module has sufficient capability to handle environmental data processing and modeling as designed.
open_risks: Potential dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data input which may affect model accuracy.
evidence_needed: Verification results showing the generated worksite model/map meets acceptance criteria.
Interface robustness tests between NGHE Solution and other modules to ensure low diffusion and data flow integrity.
